top_findings.summary: The skill description requests access to the entire `D:\Projects\*` directory and `.claude/` library structure for "LIBRARY-FIRST PROTOCOL (MANDATORY)" before performing any analysis. For a reverse engineering tool focused on analyzing specific binaries, requiring access to all projects and internal library directories is excessive and unrelated to its core purpose of binary analysis in isolated sandboxes. The skill should only need access to the specific binary file(s) being analyzed and the isolated sandbox environment, not broad filesystem access to unrelated projects and internal documentation.
